issues.description: Vision emphasizes '零框架概念，零配置负担' (zero framework concepts, zero config burden). PRD introduces agentic-core as a dependency layer with its own loop/provider abstraction, adding architectural complexity not explicit in the vision's simplicity promise.
issues.from_item: 零框架概念，零配置负担 (zero framework concepts, zero config burden)
issues.to_item: PRD Architecture: 'agentic-lite = agentic-core (LLM loop, providers, types) + agentic-filesystem + agentic-shell + tool implementations'

issues.description: Vision mentions streaming as part of core value (confirmed implemented via askStream). PRD does not document streaming API or askStream() at all.
issues.from_item: Streaming support (confirmed in vision.json as implemented feature of agentic-core)
issues.to_item: PRD has no mention of streaming, askStream(), or async generator API

issues.description: PRD says agent loop is 'delegated to agentic-core' and ask() calls runAgentLoop(). Architecture describes the loop inline in ask.ts with no mention of agentic-core delegation.
issues.from_item: PRD Agent Loop: 'Delegated to agentic-core. ask(prompt, config) calls runAgentLoop() from agentic-core'
issues.to_item: Architecture Data Flow shows loop directly in ask() with provider.chat() — no mention of agentic-core or runAgentLoop()

issues.description: PRD documents code_exec with quickjs-emscripten sandbox, auto-language detection, Python via Pyodide/subprocess, and filesystem injection. Architecture only says 'code.ts — code execution' with no detail.
issues.from_item: PRD Tools: 'code_exec — executes JS/Python code via quickjs-emscripten sandbox (browser-compatible) with auto-language detection'
issues.to_item: Architecture: 'code.ts — code execution' (no sandbox, language, or filesystem detail)

issues.description: PRD documents shell_exec as 'Node.js only, returns descriptive error in browser'. Architecture only says 'shell.ts — shell commands' with no browser safety detail.
issues.from_item: PRD Tools: 'shell_exec — executes shell commands via agentic-shell (Node.js only, returns descriptive error in browser)'
issues.to_item: Architecture: 'shell.ts — shell commands' (no browser guard detail)
